module.Aura.description: Automatically attacks the nearest living entity within range. Supports Single and Multi target modes with adjustable delay.
module.Velocity: Reduces or removes knockback received from hits
module.Velocity.description: Modifies the knockback velocity applied when taking damage. Adjust horizontal and vertical percentages independently.
module.FullBright.description: Increases the gamma level to maximum for full visibility in dark areas. Alternative Potion mode uses night vision.
module.ESP.description: Renders a colored outline or box around entities, making them visible through walls. Multiple color and style options available.
module.NoFall.description: Negates fall damage using various methods. Packet mode sends ground packets, Ground mode spoofs on-ground state.
module.ElytraSwap.description: Automatically swaps your chestplate with an elytra from your inventory. Supports Swap, EquipElytra, and EquipChestplate modes.
module.HUD: Open the HUD editor to arrange and toggle HUD elements
module.HUD.description: Opens the HUD editor screen where you can freely move, resize, and toggle HUD elements on or off.
module.AutoFarm.description: Automatically breaks fully grown crops within range. Can optionally replant new seeds after breaking.
